knowledge_cards.title: What is GITProNet
knowledge_cards.summary: Global professional association building a People-First AI ecosystem.
content: GITProNet (Global IT Professionals Network) is a professional association that brings together IT professionals, Support professionals, and Management professionals.
Its mission is to ensure Artificial Intelligence empowers people rather than replacing them.
Members collaborate to build technology, develop sector data networks, and deliver services using AI-assisted systems.
The ecosystem includes certification programs, PeopleAIHub collaboration, People AI Platform infrastructure, and JanMitra service delivery cooperatives.

knowledge_cards.title: People-First AI Concept
knowledge_cards.summary: AI designed to empower workers instead of replacing them.
content: People-First AI means Artificial Intelligence should assist professionals instead of replacing them.
AI performs repetitive tasks while humans focus on decision-making, empathy, and accountability.
The goal is to increase productivity, reduce workload, and create new forms of meaningful work.
Value created by AI should be shared with workers and communities rather than concentrated in a few corporations.

knowledge_cards.title: Professional Certification Programs
knowledge_cards.summary: Training pathways preparing professionals for the People-First AI economy.
content: GITProNet certifications prepare professionals to work in AI-enabled service ecosystems.
Each certification combines training, mentorship, projects, and practical implementation.
Programs focus on three roles required in the AI economy: technology development, ecosystem management, and service delivery.

knowledge_cards.title: CAIDP — Certified AI Developer Professional
knowledge_cards.summary: Program for developers building AI systems and assistants.
content: CAIDP prepares software developers to build responsible AI applications and intelligent assistants.
Participants learn AI agent architecture, workflow automation, and integration with real service systems.
Developers collaborate through PeopleAIHub and contribute to sector-specific AI assistants.
The program emphasizes ethical AI design and community impact.

knowledge_cards.title: CAIESP — Certified AI-Enabled Support Professional
knowledge_cards.summary: Training program for professionals delivering services with AI assistance.
content: CAIESP trains support professionals to deliver services using Jana AI assistants.
Participants learn case coordination, documentation support, client guidance, and service workflow management.
Graduates can work as JanMitra Associates providing trusted assistance to citizens, residents, and consumers.

knowledge_cards.title: CAIMP — Certified AI Management Professional
knowledge_cards.summary: Program for management professionals building data networks and service ecosystems.
content: CAIMP prepares management professionals to organize sector ecosystems.
Participants build provider networks, data banks of services, pricing frameworks, and operational models.
They coordinate technology, support professionals, and service providers across sectors.
Their role ensures AI systems operate within structured human-centered governance.

knowledge_cards.title: PeopleAIHub
knowledge_cards.summary: Collaborative platform where professionals build People-First AI systems.
content: PeopleAIHub is a collaboration environment for developers, researchers, and professionals.
Members build AI assistants, workflows, and sector-specific tools.
The platform supports open collaboration, shared documentation, and project development.
It helps professionals collectively build ethical AI technology.

knowledge_cards.title: People AI Platform
knowledge_cards.summary: Shared infrastructure enabling AI-assisted services across sectors.
content: The People AI Platform provides the technology infrastructure powering AI assistants and service workflows.
It integrates data networks, partner ecosystems, and intelligent automation.
The platform enables professionals to deliver services efficiently while maintaining accountability and human oversight.

knowledge_cards.title: Jana AI Assistants
knowledge_cards.summary: AI assistants that guide professionals and help coordinate services.
content: Jana AI Assistants help professionals complete tasks using natural language interaction.
They provide step-by-step guidance, access to data networks, and workflow automation.
Jana reduces repetitive administrative work and helps professionals focus on meaningful human interactions.

knowledge_cards.title: JanMitra Service Provider Cooperative
knowledge_cards.summary: Community-based cooperative delivering AI-assisted support services.
content: JanMitra means 'Friend of the People'.
It is a cooperative network of trained professionals delivering support services using Jana AI assistants.
JanMitra Associates help people access healthcare, education, government services, travel, finance, and other services.
The cooperative model ensures professionals have ownership, fair income opportunities, and long-term careers.

knowledge_cards.title: People-First AI Summit
knowledge_cards.summary: Global event showcasing AI systems designed to empower people.
content: The People-First AI Summit brings together professionals, innovators, and community leaders.
The summit showcases AI assistants, cooperative service models, and real-world implementations.
It is a platform for collaboration, partnerships, and launching new initiatives in the People-First AI ecosystem.

knowledge_cards.title: GITProNet Membership Benefits
knowledge_cards.summary: Benefits available to members of the association.
content: Members become part of a global professional network focused on ethical AI development and implementation.
They gain access to certification programs, collaborative platforms, and community initiatives.
Members can participate in building AI assistants, launching cooperative service models, and shaping the future of work.
